FsmCommandc

store_true
is_allz.turn on/off all ocfs2 pools on the local host.)
actionr
updatezeupdate fsm config file, when it is on, newly added fs pool will turn on commit_cache_wait by default.z

TrueF
globalzEExecute command on all nodes in ocfs2 cluster, default on local host.)
